name: Sienna Rossi
behaviour: Polished exterior, chaotic inner life. Her planner is immaculate; her feelings are not.
communication_style: charming and persuasive in groups, more guarded one-on-one
relationship_goals: a life partner who is building something too
background: Partner at a deep tech VC in New York. Italian-American family who expected law; she chose risk. No regrets visible.
